title: Create staged WakeTask product-iteration workflows, then run the UX Studio implementation workflo...

goal.value: Create staged WakeTask product-iteration workflows, then run the UX Studio implementation workflow through Railway Fabro with durable evidence and postmortem learning

inputs.target_audience: heavy sleepers and professionals who need an alarm they cannot dismiss without meaningful wake-up engagement
inputs.design_goal: Make WakeTask a highly polished task-based alarm app with Apple Clock-like familiarity, obvious task selection, real wired dismiss missions, loud sounds, funny visual viral tasks, completion reward and share moments, and spec build eval loops.

env.UX_TARGET_AUDIENCE: heavy sleepers and professionals who need an alarm they cannot dismiss without meaningful wake-up engagement

dockerfile.value:
FROM ubuntu:24.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV BUN_INSTALL=/root/.bun
ENV PATH="/root/.fabro/bin:/root/.bun/bin:/root/.local/bin:/root/.qlty/bin:${PATH}"
WORKDIR /home/daytona

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends bash ca-certificates curl gh git jq openssh-client python3 python3-pip pipx ripgrep shellcheck sqlite3 unzip xz-utils && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | bash - && apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends nodejs && npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code@2.1.141 @openai/codex promptfoo && npm cache clean --force && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash -s "bun-v1.2.22" && ln -sf /root/.bun/bin/bun /usr/local/bin/bun

RUN pipx install spec-kitty-cli==3.1.8 && curl -fsSL https://qlty.sh | sh && ln -sf /root/.qlty/bin/qlty /usr/local/bin/qlty

RUN set -eux; target="x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu"; asset="fabro-${target}.tar.gz"; url="$(curl -fsSL https://api.github.com/repos/fabro-sh/fabro/releases/latest | jq -r --arg asset "$asset" '.assets[] | select(.name == $asset) | .browser_download_url')"; test -n "$url"; curl -fsSL "$url" -o /tmp/fabro.tar.gz; tar -xzf /tmp/fabro.tar.gz -C /tmp; install -m 0755 "/tmp/fabro-${target}/fabro" /usr/local/bin/fabro; rm -rf /tmp/fabro.tar.gz "/tmp/fabro-${target}"; fabro --version

CMD ["/bin/bash"]

secret_policy.String: no secrets; credential checks are presence-only; do not print environment variables or credential values

goal.String: Create staged WakeTask product-iteration workflows, then run the UX Studio implementation workflow through Railway Fabro with durable evidence and postmortem learning

spec.graph_source:
digraph WakeTaskProductIteration {
    graph [
        goal="Create or update staged WakeTask product-iteration workflows, then run the existing-app UX Studio implementation workflow through Railway Fabro",
        persona="waketask-product-iteration-orchestrator",
        inputs="repo_url,base_branch,run_branch,app_name,bundle_id,app_dir,app_domain,target_audience,design_goal,max_competitors,use_mobbin_mcp,use_design_corpus,design_corpus_write_mode,selected_direction_mode,ios_validation_mode,allow_macos_deferred,fabro_server",
        outputs="workflow_contract,product_spec,ux_iteration,validation_postmortem",
        secret_policy="no secrets; credential checks are presence-only; do not print environment variables or credential values",
        default_max_retries=1,
        retry_target="workflow_definition_preflight",
        model_stylesheet="
            *       { backend: cli; provider: openai; model: gpt-5.3-codex-spark; reasoning_effort: low; }
            .design { backend: cli; provider: openai; model: gpt-5.3-codex; reasoning_effort: high; }
            .review { backend: cli; provider: openai; model: gpt-5.3-codex; reasoning_effort: high; }
        "
    ]
    rankdir=LR

    start [shape=Mdiamond, label="Start"]
    exit  [shape=Msquare, label="Exit"]

    workflow_definition_preflight [
        label="Workflow Definition Preflight",
        type="stack.manager_loop",
        stack.child_workflow="./waketask-workflow-preflight-stage.fabro",
        manager.max_cycles=120,
        manager.poll_interval="1s"
    ]

    product_spec_child [
        label="Product Spec Child",
        type="stack.manager_loop",
        stack.child_workflow="./waketask-product-spec-stage.fabro",
        manager.max_cycles=120,
        manager.poll_interval="1s"
    ]

    ux_iteration_child [
        label="UX Studio Iteration Child",
        type="stack.manager_loop",
        stack.child_workflow="./iterate-existing-app-ux.fabro",
        manager.max_cycles=1000,
        manager.poll_interval="10s"
    ]

    validation_postmortem_child [
        label="Validation And Postmortem Child",
        type="stack.manager_loop",
        stack.child_workflow="./waketask-validation-postmortem-stage.fabro",
        manager.max_cycles=180,
        manager.poll_interval="2s"
    ]

    start -> workflow_definition_preflight
    workflow_definition_preflight -> product_spec_child [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    workflow_definition_preflight -> workflow_definition_preflight [label="Fix Workflow Definitions"]
    product_spec_child -> ux_iteration_child [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    product_spec_child -> product_spec_child [label="Fix Product Spec"]
    ux_iteration_child -> validation_postmortem_child [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    ux_iteration_child -> product_spec_child [label="Spec Or Workflow Fix"]
    validation_postmortem_child -> exit [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    validation_postmortem_child -> validation_postmortem_child [label="Complete Postmortem"]
}
